_README: Pre-seed for the only two legacy clients still active: PhatBuns + Henny's. Just identity fields — page_id, ig_user_id, ad_account_id, ig_username — so the OAuth callback recognises them by ig_user_id and lands them straight on /dashboard with no picker. They add their own locations via /dashboard/locations after first login (with address geocoding). Fill in the TODO_ fields before running `npm run seed:legacy`.
